== Notes for [[Item:Q98411|Q98411]] ==

* [http://mechon-mamre.org/p/pt/pt25a03.htm#21 1 Chronicles 3:21.]

Abarbanel – undated handwritten manuscript from the collection of the late Rabbi Shmuel Gorr, held by Chaim Freedman.

Reference was made to “Elef Margaliot” 1993, Meir Wunder.

see page 552

see page 552

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBC921141EFBBF89829A6488A4D207E
geni:6000000009708392369

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
